phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Caldas stop is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a paragem das Caldas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH puh-RAH-zhayng DUHSH KAHL-duhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Regional bus stops in Portugal are generally grouped by destination zones within the terminal.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Paragem Caldas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh puh-RAH-zhayng KAHL-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Caldas stop.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Caldas stop.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh puh-RAH-zhayng KAHL-duhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para Paragem Caldas.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de espera?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a sala de espera.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the waiting room.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the waiting room.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a sala de espera.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket window is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a janela da bilheteira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH zhuh-NEH-luh DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese ticket windows usually operate a numbered queue system for orderly service.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para a bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the ticket window.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the ticket window.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas para a bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Peniche stop is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a paragem para Peniche?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH puh-RAH-zhayng PUH-ruh peh-NEE-shih?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portugal, bus stops at terminals are typically designated by destination rather than numbered platforms.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Paragem Peniche.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng peh-NEE-shih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Peniche stop.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Peniche stop.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng peh-NEE-shih.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Paragem Peniche.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar um bilhete de autocarro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR OONNG bee-LYEH-tih DIH ow-too-KAH-roo?

likely_response.translation_en: Go to the bus ticket office.

responses.english: Go to the bus ticket office.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Lisbon stop is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a paragem para Lisboa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH puh-RAH-zhayng PUH-ruh leezh-BOHUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Long-distance bus stops in Portugal are often located near main information desks for easy access.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Paragem Lisboa.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng leezh-BOHUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Lisbon stop.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Lisbon stop.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng leezh-BOHUH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Paragem Lisboa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Caldas stop is
phrases.cultural_note: The Caldas stop is for buses to Caldas da Rainha, a nearby town known for its thermal baths.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Paragem Caldas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh puh-RAH-zhayng KAHL-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Caldas stop.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Caldas stop.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh puh-RAH-zhayng KAHL-duhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para Paragem Caldas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waiting room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de espera?
phrases.cultural_note: Waiting rooms in Portuguese terminals are typically compact and positioned near ticket counters.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto à bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is next to the ticket window.

responses.english: Good morning, it is next to the ticket window.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica junto à bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the information counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o balcão de informações?
phrases.cultural_note: Information counters at Portuguese terminals are staffed during operating hours and handle route inquiries.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está junto à bilheteira rodoviária.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh roo-doo-VEEAHR-yuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is next to the bus ticket office.

responses.english: Good morning, it is next to the bus ticket office.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh roo-doo-VEEAHR-yuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, está junto à bilheteira rodoviária.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waiting room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de espera?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The waiting room is usually near the ticket counter in Portuguese bus terminals.

likely_response.local: Ao lado da bilheteira, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW LAH-doo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the ticket office, on the right.

responses.english: Next to the ticket office, on the right.
responses.phonetic: OW LAH-doo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: Ao lado da bilheteira, à direita.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de espera?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The waiting room is usually near the ticket counter in Portuguese bus terminals.

likely_response.local: Ao lado da bilheteira, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW LAH-doo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the ticket office, on the right.

responses.english: Next to the ticket office, on the right.
responses.phonetic: OW LAH-doo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: Ao lado da bilheteira, à direita.
